details: Scenes remember slider positions, aperture scale, and boundary toggle between visits. First visit starts random; return visits restore your last settings. Randomize saves too. Clear Settings button on the index page wipes saved audio and all stored params.
Version history now loads from a shared data file. Index page shows latest, a preview of the previous, and the most recent major release. Full history on its own page.

summary: Index page overhaul. Recording terms gate.
details: Reorganized main page text layout into a cleaner hierarchy. Merged info popup content into The Basics. Removed the info box modal and its play-button gate. Added a one-time recording terms acknowledgment before first record — covers music rights and fair use. Reviewable from the index footer.
Per-band bass smoothing across all scenes and the offline recorder. Tighter kick and bass transients. Updated integration tests.
Playwright end-to-end test suite — 65 tests covering UI state, math parity across scenes, and SCENE contract validation.
Minor UI adjustments: toolbar button layout, popout control panel sizing, version history formatting, index page text edits. Format preview now defaults to 9:16 on portrait viewports.
18 audio-reactive particle scenes built on Three.js and WebGL. Each scene has 8 control sliders, a narrative arc that shifts the visuals over the length of the track, and background drift cycles.

Playback from file upload or Listen mode (live mic input). Offline MP4 recording at 60 fps, encoded and muxed in the browser via WebCodecs. Format preview for 16:9, 1:1, and 9:16. Audio cached locally via IndexedDB.
Popout control panel for live slider adjustment, randomize, and format selection. Fullscreen toggle. Static site — no server, no build tools, no tracking.
